fields.name: Computer Science
fields.intro: The study of computation, information, and automation, focusing on algorithms and software theory.
fields.scope: The foundation of the entire tech industry, offering the most versatile career paths in global markets.

careerSnapshot.jobRoles: Software Architect, System Analyst, Research Scientist

fields.name: Software Engineering
fields.intro: Focuses on the systematic application of engineering principles to software development life cycles.
fields.scope: High demand in the corporate sector for building scalable, reliable, and efficient enterprise software.

careerSnapshot.jobRoles: DevOps Engineer, Full Stack Developer, QA Manager

fields.name: Artificial Intelligence
fields.intro: Specialized field focusing on creating systems capable of performing tasks that require human intelligence.
fields.scope: The future of technology, impacting healthcare, finance, and autonomous systems worldwide.

careerSnapshot.jobRoles: ML Engineer, AI Specialist, Data Scientist

fields.name: Data Science
fields.intro: Combines statistics, mathematics, and programming to extract meaningful insights from large data sets.
fields.scope: Critical for decision-making in tech giants and financial institutions.

careerSnapshot.jobRoles: Data Analyst, Data Architect, Business Lead

fields.name: Cyber Security
fields.intro: The practice of protecting systems, networks, and programs from digital attacks.
fields.scope: Growing importance due to increasing cyber threats globally; high pay in specialized defense roles.

careerSnapshot.jobRoles: Security Analyst, Penetration Tester, SOC Engineer

fields.name: Electrical Engineering
fields.intro: Focuses on the study of electricity, electronics, and electromagnetism for power and communication.
fields.scope: Backbone of infrastructure, power grids, and the booming EV industry.

careerSnapshot.jobRoles: Power Engineer, Telecom Lead, Control Engineer

fields.name: Mechanical Engineering
fields.intro: Application of physics and materials science for the design and manufacturing of mechanical systems.
fields.scope: Crucial for automotive, aerospace, and heavy machinery industries.

careerSnapshot.jobRoles: Production Engineer, Design Engineer, Plant Manager

fields.name: Computer Engineering
fields.intro: Combines Electrical Engineering and Computer Science to develop computer hardware and software.
fields.scope: Specialized roles in hardware design, firmware, and IoT development.

careerSnapshot.jobRoles: Firmware Engineer, Hardware Architect, IoT Lead

fields.name: Civil Engineering
fields.intro: Design, construction, and maintenance of the physical and naturally built environment.
fields.scope: Massive scope in national construction projects, dams, and urban development.

careerSnapshot.jobRoles: Site Engineer, Structural Designer, Project Manager

fields.name: Business Administration
fields.intro: Comprehensive study of business management, marketing, and leadership.
fields.scope: Wide range of careers in corporate management, banking, and startups.

careerSnapshot.jobRoles: Brand Manager, HR Head, Business Consultant

fields.name: Accounting & Finance
fields.intro: Focuses on financial reporting, auditing, and corporate finance strategies.
fields.scope: High career growth in banking, auditing firms, and financial consultancies.
